name: Beans Kale
recipeIngredient: salt, pepper, red pepper flakes to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cooked white beans with lemon juice, salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes until well combined.
2. Heat gently and mash the mixture slightly.
3. Chop the onion and sauté until golden.
4. Add minced garlic to the sautéed onions and cook until fragrant.
5. Shred the kale leaves and add them to the garlic onion mix.
6. Continue cooking until the greens are wilted.
7. Serve the beans on top of the prepared greens.
